DP.497.0000:
Dawn: Oh! There you are!
Please, come with me!\r
The professor is waiting!\f
DP.497.0001:
This is it!
Our Pokémon Research Lab!\f
Let’s go...\f
DP.497.0002:
Lucas: Hi! I’ve been waiting for you!
Please, come with me.\r
The prof’s waiting to see you.\f
DP.497.0003:
See? This is our Pokémon Research
Lab.\f
We’ll just go ahead and...\f
DP.497.0005:
[0103,0000]: What the...\f
Oh, it’s you, [0103,0001]!\f
That old guy... He’s not scary so
much as he is totally out there!\f
Aww, it doesn’t matter, [0103,0001].
I’m out of here. See you later!\f
DP.497.0006:
Dawn: Wow, what was that?\f
Your friend sure seems to be really
impatient.\f
Well, anyway...
Let’s go inside.\f
DP.497.0007:
Lucas: What was that?!\f
Your friend always seems to be
in such a rush.\f
Anyway...
Let’s go in.\f
DP.497.0008:
Dawn: OK, [0103,0001], I’ll act as
your mentor.\f
I’ve got a bit more experience than
you as a Trainer and as the\r
professor’s assistant.\f
OK, follow me!\f
DP.497.0009:
This building with the red roof is
the Pokémon Center.\f
It’s the place that heals Pokémon
that have been hurt in battle.\f
You can find a Pokémon Center in
most towns.\f
DP.497.0010:
The building with the blue roof over
here is the Poké Mart.\f
It’s a shop where you can buy and
sell items and medicine.\f
[0103,0000], since you’re a novice
Trainer, you won’t be able to buy\r
many kinds of merchandise.\f
Don’t let it bother you!\f
DP.497.0011:
Oh, that’s right!
[0103,0000]...\f
Don’t you need to let your family
know that you’re going to be helping\r
Prof. Rowan with the Pokédex?\f
You may need to go far away, so I
think you should let someone know.\f
Oh, but before you go, heal up your
Pokémon at the Poké Center.\f
It will be a lot less scary that way.
OK, bye now!\f
DP.497.0013:
[0103,0000]: Hey, [0103,0001]!
I want to show you a few things.\r
So, follow me!\f
DP.497.0014:
This building with the red roof is
the Pokémon Center.\f
You can get your Pokémon healed if
it’s been hurt in battle.\f
You’ll find a Pokémon Center in most
towns.\f
DP.497.0015:
Over here, the building with the blue
roof is the Poké Mart.\f
It’s a shop where you can buy and
sell all sorts of items.\f
[0103,0000], since you’re a rookie
Trainer, you won’t be able to buy\r
very much stuff.\f
Don’t worry about it, OK?\f
DP.497.0016:
Oh, yeah, right!
[0103,0000]...\f
You should let your family know
you’re helping Prof. Rowan put\r
together his Pokédex.\f
Sometimes, you have to go far away,
so you should let someone know.\f
Oh, but first, go heal up your
Pokémon at the Poké Center.\f
You’ll be safe then.
OK, be seeing you!\f
DP.497.0017:
Oh, wow!
Pokémon are so cool!\f
You can make yours battle and make
them stronger!\f
I wish I had some!
It’s so cool!
DP.497.0018:
That thing you have!\f
It’s a Pokédex, isn’t it?!\f
You’re off to see all kinds of
Pokémon now! Lucky you!
DP.497.0019:
So I don’t forget what’s happened,
till now, I’d better save this...\f
There!
Now I can take a break.
DP.497.0020:
Professor Rowan’s come back to town!\f
It must be, like, four years since
he left.\f
They say he was doing his research
somewhere else all this time.
DP.497.0024:
All Your Item Needs Fulfilled!
Pokémon Mart
